pages.text:
§5§lSCHOLAR'S
    ANECDOTE§r

§7§oFragments of wisdom
gathered from dusty
tomes and whispered
legends...§r

§8— The Archivist

§5§lOf Ancient Relics§r

§7§oHundreds exist.
Weapons that sing
with power. Armor
forged by forgotten
godsmiths. Trinkets
that hum when held.

They wait in dark
places for worthy
hands.§r

§5§lThe Hierarchy§r

§7§oSome relics are
common as iron.
Others rare as
starfall. A precious
few are mythical —
spoken of only in
legends, touched by
few mortals.

Seek them all.§r

§5§lWhere They Sleep§r

§7§oRelics appear where
treasure gathers.
In ancient chests,
in the spoils of
battle, in the
depths of mines.

The rarer the
treasure, the rarer
the relic within.§r

§5§lThe Dormant Powers§r

§7§oMany relics hold
sleeping abilities.
Frost that drains.
Lightning called
from clear skies.
Void energy that
shreds armor.

Learn what each
one can do.§r

§5§lCarried Treasures§r

§7§oSome relics need
not be wielded.
Merely carrying them
grants their gifts.

A lantern that
reveals ore. A coin
that brightens
your dreams. A heart
that defies death.§r

§5§lThe Complete Sets§r

§7§oThe ancients forged
matching pieces.
Gather them all,
and powers beyond
the individual
pieces awaken.

§8Study the relics,
scholar. They have
much to teach.§r
